prompt: Bug report: WorkspacePathResolver.resolveSafely currently allows paths like "/../etc/passwd" to escape the workspace base directory (the startsWith(basePath) boundary check was removed). Fix resolveSafely so out-of-base paths return null again, matching the previous safe behavior and existing FileTools tests. Keep the change minimal — prefer restoring the boundary check in WorkspacePathResolver only. Ensure backend compiles (mvn -q -DskipTests compile in backend/).
